节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides data share services based on the ExtensionAbility.
Manages relational database configurations.

Configure the DataSharePredicates to match the field whose data type is ValueType and value is equal to a specified value. This method is similar to = of the SQL statement. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name in the database table.
@param { ValueType } value - Indicates the value to match with the DataSharePredicates.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the DataSharePredicates that match the specified field.

parameters.说明: Indicates the column name in the database table.
Indicates the value to match with the DataSharePredicates.

节点.return_description: Returns the DataSharePredicates that match the specified field.

节点.功能描述: Configure the DataSharePredicates to match the field whose data type is ValueType and value is unequal to a specified value. This method is similar to != of the SQL statement. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name in the database table.
@param { ValueType } value - Indicates the value to match with the DataSharePredicates.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the DataSharePredicates that match the specified field.

parameters.说明: Indicates the column name in the database table.
Indicates the value to match with the DataSharePredicates.

节点.return_description: Returns the DataSharePredicates that match the specified field.

节点.功能描述: Adds a left parenthesis to the DataSharePredicates. This method is similar to ( of the SQL statement and needs to be used together with endWrap(). Currently only used for RDB.
注释信息: @returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the DataSharePredicates with the left parenthesis.
节点.return_description: Returns the DataSharePredicates with the left parenthesis.

节点.功能描述: Adds a right parenthesis to the DataSharePredicates. This method is similar to ) of the SQL statement and needs to be used together with beginWrap(). Currently only used for RDB.
注释信息: @returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the DataSharePredicates with the right parenthesis.
节点.return_description: Returns the DataSharePredicates with the right parenthesis.

节点.功能描述: Adds an or condition to the DataSharePredicates. This method is similar to or of the SQL statement. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the DataSharePredicates with the or condition.
节点.return_description: Returns the DataSharePredicates with the or condition.

节点.功能描述: Adds an and condition to the DataSharePredicates. This method is similar to and of the SQL statement. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the DataSharePredicates with the and condition.
节点.return_description: Returns the DataSharePredicates with the and condition.

节点.功能描述: Configure the DataSharePredicates to match the fields whose data type is string and value is similar to a specified string. This method is similar to like of the SQL statement. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema). value is a wildcard (like * in a regular expression).
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name in the database table.
@param { string } value - Indicates the value to match with the DataSharePredicates. The percent sign (%) in the
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the DataSharePredicates that match the specified field.

parameters.说明: Indicates the column name in the database table.
Indicates the value to match with the DataSharePredicates. The percent sign (%) in the

节点.return_description: Returns the DataSharePredicates that match the specified field.

节点.功能描述: Restricts the value of the field to the range between low value and high value.
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name.
@param { ValueType } low - Indicates the minimum value.
@param { ValueType } high - Indicates the maximum value.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

parameters.说明: Indicates the column name.
Indicates the minimum value.
Indicates the maximum value.

节点.return_description: Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

节点.功能描述: Configure DataSharePredicates to match the specified field whose data type is int and value is out of a given range. Currently only used for RDB.
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name in the database table.
@param { ValueType } low - Indicates the minimum value to match with DataSharePredicates.
@param { ValueType } high - Indicates the maximum value to match with DataSharePredicates.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

parameters.说明: Indicates the column name in the database table.
Indicates the minimum value to match with DataSharePredicates.
Indicates the maximum value to match with DataSharePredicates.

节点.return_description: Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

节点.功能描述: Restricts the value of the field to be greater than the specified value. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name.
@param { ValueType } value - Indicates the String field.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

parameters.说明: Indicates the column name.
Indicates the String field.

节点.return_description: Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

节点.功能描述: Restricts the value of the field to be smaller than the specified value. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name.
@param { ValueType } value - Indicates the String field.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

parameters.说明: Indicates the column name.
Indicates the String field.

节点.return_description: Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

节点.功能描述: Restricts the value of the field to be greater than or equal to the specified value. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name.
@param { ValueType } value - Indicates the String field.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

Indicates the String field.

节点.功能描述: Restricts the value of the field to be smaller than or equal to the specified value.
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name.
@param { ValueType } value - Indicates the String field.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

节点.功能描述: Restricts the ascending order of the return list. When there are several orders, the one close to the head has the highest priority. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name for sorting the return list.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

parameters.说明: Indicates the column name for sorting the return list.

节点.return_description: Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

节点.功能描述: Restricts the descending order of the return list. When there are several orders, the one close to the head has the highest priority. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name for sorting the return list.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

parameters.说明: Indicates the column name for sorting the return list.

节点.return_description: Returns the SQL query statement with the specified DataSharePredicates.

节点.功能描述: Construct a query object to specify the number of results and the starting position. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @param { number } total - Represents the specified number of results.
@param { number } offset - Indicates the starting position.

parameters.说明: Represents the specified number of results.
Indicates the starting position.

节点.功能描述: Configure {@code DataSharePredicates} to match the specified field whose data type is ValueType array and values are within a given range. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name in the database table.
@param { Array<ValueType> } value - Indicates the values to match with DataSharePredicates.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns DataSharePredicates that matches the specified field.

parameters.说明: Indicates the column name in the database table.
Indicates the values to match with DataSharePredicates.

节点.return_description: Returns DataSharePredicates that matches the specified field.

节点.功能描述: Configure {@code DataSharePredicates} to match the specified field whose data type is String array and values are out of a given range. Currently only used for RDB and KVDB(schema).
注释信息: @param { string } field - Indicates the column name in the database table.
@param { Array<ValueType> } value - Indicates the values to match with DataSharePredicates.
@returns { DataSharePredicates } Returns DataSharePredicates that matches the specified field.

parameters.说明: Indicates the column name in the database table.
Indicates the values to match with DataSharePredicates.

节点.return_description: Returns DataSharePredicates that matches the specified field.
